github.copilot.chat.reviewSelection.inst.text: Never use Unicode characters, emojis, or special symbols in code. Use only ASCII characters. Replace any emojis with descriptive text comments.
All code must use standard ASCII characters only. No Unicode symbols, emojis, or special characters are allowed.
Use clear, descriptive variable names and comments instead of Unicode symbols or emojis.
Do not use Mock, simulate, or Stub in the code. Write real, functional code that can be executed and tested.
